languages.text: Эфир вокса полнится возгласами ужаса тех, кто обнаружил страшную находку. На мостике, в троне капитана, сидит бледный мужчина, окутанный и пронизанный паутиной труб. Вокруг кресла с тошнотворной старательностью разложены истерзанные трупы.

traits.locale_text: Эфир вокса полнится возгласами ужаса тех, кто обнаружил страшную находку. На мостике, в троне капитана, сидит бледный мужчина, окутанный и пронизанный паутиной труб. Вокруг кресла с тошнотворной старательностью разложены истерзанные трупы.

languages.text: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.
languages.original_text: Эфир вокса полнится возгласами ужаса тех, кто обнаружил страшную находку. На мостике, в троне капитана, сидит бледный мужчина, окутанный и пронизанный паутиной труб. Вокруг кресла с тошнотворной старательностью разложены истерзанные трупы.

On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

languages.text: 音阵频道里充斥着队员们惊恐的尖叫，他们发现了极其可怕的东西。在舰桥上，一个面色苍白的男人坐在船长宝座之上，无数管线进出他的血肉，在他身上结成了网。而在宝座四周，饱受折磨的尸体被摆放得整整齐齐，令人毛骨悚然。
languages.original_text: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

traits.locale_text: 音阵频道里充斥着队员们惊恐的尖叫，他们发现了极其可怕的东西。在舰桥上，一个面色苍白的男人坐在船长宝座之上，无数管线进出他的血肉，在他身上结成了网。而在宝座四周，饱受折磨的尸体被摆放得整整齐齐，令人毛骨悚然。

languages.text: La frecuencia de voco se llena de gritos de terror de los miembros del equipo, que han realizado un descubrimiento espantoso. En el puente, un hombre pálido está sentado en el trono del capitán, envuelto en una red de tubos que entra y sale de su carne. En torno al trono, hay colocados unos cadáveres torturados con precisión enfermiza.
languages.original_text: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

traits.locale_text: La frecuencia de voco se llena de gritos de terror de los miembros del equipo, que han realizado un descubrimiento espantoso. En el puente, un hombre pálido está sentado en el trono del capitán, envuelto en una red de tubos que entra y sale de su carne. En torno al trono, hay colocados unos cadáveres torturados con precisión enfermiza.

languages.text: Les membres de l'escouade ont fait une horrible découverte, et leurs cris saturent la fréquence d'émission du vox. Sur la passerelle, un homme pâle est assis dans le fauteuil du capitaine, relié à un réseau de tubes qui entrent et ressortent de son corps. Tout autour de lui, des corps torturés sont disposés avec une précision macabre.
languages.original_text: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

traits.locale_text: Les membres de l'escouade ont fait une horrible découverte, et leurs cris saturent la fréquence d'émission du vox. Sur la passerelle, un homme pâle est assis dans le fauteuil du capitaine, relié à un réseau de tubes qui entrent et ressortent de son corps. Tout autour de lui, des corps torturés sont disposés avec une précision macabre.

languages.text: Voks frekansı, korkunç bir keşif yapan manga üyelerinin dehşet çığlıklarıyla doluyor. Köprüde solgun bir adam, kaptan tahtında oturuyor. Etine giren ve çıkan tüplerden oluşan bir ağa dolanmış. İşkence görmüş cesetler, tahtın etrafına mide bulandırıcı bir hassasiyetle dizilmiş.
languages.original_text: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

traits.locale_text: Voks frekansı, korkunç bir keşif yapan manga üyelerinin dehşet çığlıklarıyla doluyor. Köprüde solgun bir adam, kaptan tahtında oturuyor. Etine giren ve çıkan tüplerden oluşan bir ağa dolanmış. İşkence görmüş cesetler, tahtın etrafına mide bulandırıcı bir hassasiyetle dizilmiş.

languages.text: Die Voxfrequenz ist erfüllt von den Angstschreien der Soldaten, die eine entsetzliche Entdeckung gemacht haben. Auf der Brücke sitzt ein blasser Mann auf dem Thron des Captains. Er ist in ein Netz aus Röhren gehüllt, die in seinen Körper und wieder hinaus führen. Um den Thron herum wurden mit abscheulicher Präzision gefolterte Leichen angeordnet.
languages.original_text: The vox frequency is filled with cries of horror from squad members, who have made a terrible discovery. On the bridge, a pale man sits on the captain's throne, wrapped in a web of tubes going in and out of his flesh. Around the throne, tortured corpses are laid out with sickening precision.

Er ist in ein Netz aus Röhren gehüllt, die in seinen Körper und wieder hinaus führen. Um den Thron herum wurden mit abscheulicher Präzision gefolterte Leichen angeordnet.

languages.text: ボックスの周りは、恐ろしい発見をした隊員たちの悲鳴で溢れていた。ブリッジでは、蒼白い男が船長の椅子に座り、肉体から伸びる管の網に包まれていた。その椅子を取り囲むように、拷問によって死んだ隊員たちの遺体が、不快なほど正確に並べられていた。
